title: Define a raw register-user DTO
scenario: An HTTP adapter receives partial, untrusted data. Start by representing that boundary data separately from the domain command.
instructions: Define RegisterUserDto with public email: Option<String> and display_name: Option<String> fields.

files.content: // TODO: define the raw adapter DTO for registering a user.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps dto-struct-raw explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
